name: Gateway of Truth
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the start of the battle, gain Keyflare equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen. The first Posse issuance in each battle repeats this effect.
lore:
She is the embodiment of wisdom.

She holds all the knowledge in the world—the highest aim of every scholar in Mythag.

Even hearing a single word from her can bring sudden, profound enlightenment.

Yet she calls herself only a gatekeeper.

What kind of gate?

No one has ever seen it, so the scholars call it "Truth."

She is the gatekeeper of truth, the Athena of Mythag.

Tawil never denies this—nor confirms it.

She simply watches—
watching this place and this world with a constant, silent compassion.

If you ever see that gate, you'll find a familiar eye upon it.

Its gaze is calm and eternal.
It pierces through time, through your very soul.
